00001 #ifndef EXTREMAL_SURFACE_H
00002 #define EXTREMAL_SURFACE_H
00003 
00004 #include "es_optimize_context.h"
00005 #include <gsl/gsl_errno.h>
00006 #include <gsl/gsl_math.h>
00007 #include <gsl/gsl_min.h>
00008 
00010 
00011 class ExtremalSurface{
00012   public:
00013 
00015     virtual Vector3 normal( const Vector3 &p ) = 0;
00016 
00018     virtual float energy( const Vector3 &x, Vector3 a ) = 0;
00019 
00021     virtual Vector3 proj( const Vector3 &p );
00022 
00024     inline float energy( const Vector3 &x ){  return energy( x, normal(x) ); }
00025 
00027     inline void optimization_radius( float r ){  _optimization_radius = r; } 
00028 
00030     inline const float optimization_radius() const { return _optimization_radius; }
00031 
00033     inline void convergency_tol( float c ){  _convergency_tol = c; } 
00034 
00036     inline const float convergency_tol() const { return _convergency_tol; }
00037 
00039     inline void max_niter( int m ){  _max_niter = m; } 
00040 
00042     inline const int max_niter() const { return _max_niter; }
00043 
00044   private:
00045 
00047     float _optimization_radius;
00048 
00050     float _convergency_tol;
00051 
00053     int _max_niter;
00054  
00055   protected:
00056 
00058     virtual Vector3 minimize_energy( const Vector3 &p ); 
00059 };
00060 
00061 
00062 #endif
